'''Hrekin Thorm''' was an obese [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] from [[Fedalle/Legends|Fedalle]] and served in both the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] and the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].

==Biography==
Like his constituents, Hrekin Thorm was pragmatic and supported the dominant galactic power—so long as he and his homeworld benefited. During the reign of both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] Thorm used his homeworld's power and influence to his advantage.

During his service in the New Republic Senate, Thorm cultivated ties between himself and a number of industries in the Core. Eventually he was appointed to the New Republic's [[Inner Council (New Republic)|Inner Council]], where he continued to follow the crowd. Occasionally Hrekin Thorm showed a ruthless streak, but only when his target was already down. One prominent example of this was his suggestion that [[Kyp Durron]] be executed for the destruction of [[Carida/Legends|Carida]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Kevin J. Anderson]] originally intended for Hrekin Thorm to be [[Threkin Horm]], the obese President of the [[Alderaanian Council]] who first appeared in ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''. However, a typographical error was made and was noted. When ''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' was written, Hrekin Thorm was given a distinct biography to establish him as a character separate from Threkin Horm, thus making Hrekin Thorm a character who owed his existence to a typographical error.<ref name="forums">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=158725&start=88#11212876|thread=Spelling Discrepancies|author=[[Abel G. Peña|Halagad]]|date=2005-06-05|time=8:25 PM}}</ref>
